item.title: Of course this random midlife crisis is Israeli thinks that monarchy is the answer because that’s the answer that benefits the w...
item.description:
Of course this random midlife crisis is Israeli thinks that monarchy is the answer because that’s the answer that benefits the west#greenscreenvideo

item.title: The reason they say this is because they never want you to question whether or what it would look like if the ethnostate that th...
item.description:
The reason they say this is because they never want you to question whether or what it would look like if the ethnostate that they support did not exist, and of course they always fill in that possibility with the worst most reprehensible option#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: For the love of God, do not take this as apologias for the Democrats, it is actually giving you a better tool set to undermine t...
item.description:
For the love of God, do not take this as apologias for the Democrats, it is actually giving you a better tool set to undermine them because they would love a weak feckless leftist that can’t articulate exactly what is wrong with the liberals



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Wow it’s almost like the empire has outposts everywhere, and they take on their regional nature but the same postion in relation...
item.description:
Wow it’s almost like the empire has outposts everywhere, and they take on their regional nature but the same postion in relation to the primary contradiction

item.title: They really can’t stay away from characterising themselves correctly as the storm troopers#greenscreenvideo
